text: Front-load the primary keyword — category-defining term early in the title, immediately after the product name (name always leads).
One term, one place — don't waste indexed space repeating a word already indexed.
Backend = pure discovery reserve — synonyms, misspellings, other-language variants appearing nowhere in visible copy.
rubric: Current backend terms are seller-private: score 'unknown' for the current listing unless operator-supplied.

text: Fill every attribute field — blank structured fields lose filters and COSMO retrieval.
Map to the tightest valid browse node (suggestion only without Seller Central access).
rubric: Compare current category depth to the most specific plausible node for the product type.

text: Cover the full query surface — head terms, long-tail, use-case phrases, misspellings across title + highlights + bullets + backend, without duplication.
rubric: Judge breadth of distinct query intents covered across surfaces.

text: Write for situations, not just keywords — lead content with the buyer situation.
rubric: Do bullets/description lead with concrete buyer situations?

text: One situational anchor per major use-case — a distinct, quotable line per core scenario.
Use comparative framing — what the product is for vs alternatives and who it's best for.
Keep A+ modules as real text — comparison, who-it's-for, FAQ extractable as text, not baked into images.
Mirror compliant buyer/review language so semantics reinforce each other.
rubric: Does copy phrasing align with plausible buyer language for the use-cases?

text: Seed accurate structured Q&A mirroring the same facts as bullets and A+ FAQ.
Substantiated trust over forbidden social proof — no star/review claims; documentable signals only.
Consistency is a ranking and trust asset — every recurring fact agrees across all surfaces.
Time events 6–8 weeks ahead for reindex + AI-model incorporation.
rubric: Process rule — not a property of a listing snapshot.

text: Worker ≠ checker — copy writer never approves; independent verification before state advance.
rubric: Process rule — enforced structurally by the app (audit module computes verified).
